title: Unlimited Chisel Works - Botany
body:
This addon adds Botany (from Binnie's Mods) Pigmented Glass and Ceramic Blocks to the set of blocks Unlimited Chisel Works generates variants for. It also changes the Pigmented Glass texture to match vanilla (or your resource pack)'s Stained Glass, as Chisel provides a superior, CTM-compatible clear glass texture variant.

Requires Unlimited Chisel Works 0.1.8 or later!
